features: LONG-LASTING FRESH BREATH – Active Fresh technology helps keep breath feeling clean and refreshed for longer
DAILY ORAL CARE TOOTHPASTE – Supports everyday dental hygiene as part of a regular brushing routine
HELPS REMOVE PLAQUE – Cleans teeth effectively to maintain a healthy mouth
COOL MINT FLAVOUR – Leaves a fresh, clean sensation after brushing
description: Product Description Aquafresh Active Fresh Toothpaste is designed to provide long-lasting freshness while supporting everyday oral care. Its effective cleaning formula helps remove plaque and leaves the mouth feeling clean and refreshed with a cool mint flavour. Suitable for daily use, this 100ml toothpaste is ideal for maintaining fresh breath and a healthy smile. Ingredients Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sorbitol, Glycerin, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Aroma, Xanthan Gum, PEG-6, Sodium Fluoride, Alumina, Sodium Saccharin, Carrageenan, Limonene Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush, brush teeth in circular motions for 2 minutes, focusing on all surfaces, and then rinse with water. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Haleon, Building 5, First Floor the Heights Weybridge Surrey KT13 0NY See more
